query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'tattoo_generations' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 25vRfUBwvHKUCo5.root --database Pa7E4RBX4UbpFBvKpz2nxk --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'tattoo_generations' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_DEFAULT
id	int	NO	NULL
userId	int	YES	NULL
sessionId	varchar	NO	NULL
userPrompt	text	NO	NULL
refinedPrompt	text	YES	NULL
imageUrl	text	NO	NULL
referenceImageUrl	text	YES	NULL
style	varchar	YES	NULL
createdAt	timestamp	NO	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
bodyPlacement	varchar	YES	NULL
sizeLabel	varchar	YES	NULL
sizeInCm	varchar	YES	NULL
